content.cn_text: 学生:早上好。那是科普威尔油井保险吗?我想问你几个关于投保的问题。
content.en_text: Student: Good morning. Is that Copewell well insurance ? I'd like to ask you a few questions about getting insurance.

content.cn_text: 售货员:当然可以。你想买哪种保险?
content.en_text: Salesman: Certainly. What kind of insurance are you looking for?

content.cn_text: 学生:嗯，我是学生，我需要全面的保险——你知道，防止盗窃、损坏、法律问题……
content.en_text: Student: Well, I'm a student and I need comprehensive cover-you know, against theft,damage, legal problems …

content.cn_text: 售货员:明白了。不幸的是，学生很容易成为小偷的目标。学生宿舍是一个特别的目标，因为它通常包含一些非常便携和贵重的物品，如笔记本电脑。我们提供专门为学生需求设计的保险，涵盖几个关键领域的学生。
content.en_text: Salesman: I see. Students are unfortunately attractive targets for thieves. Student accommodation is a particular target because it often contains several highly portable and valuable items such as laptops. We offer cover specially designed for the needs of students, covering students in several key areas.

content.cn_text: 学生:哦，听起来这正是我所需要的。请多告诉我一些。
content.en_text: Student: Oh, that sounds like it's exactly what I need. Please tell me more.

content.cn_text: 售货员:嗯，我们首先要谈的是房间内的物品。我们为您的财产提供“以新换旧”的保险，包括台式电脑，以防盗窃、管道爆裂、火灾、人为破坏、风暴和洪水。
content.en_text: Salesman: Well, the first area we cover is room contents . We provide insurance cover for your belongings on a 'new for old' basis, including desktop computers, against theft, burst pipes, fire, vandalism , storm and flood.

content.cn_text: 学生:如果我住在大学宿舍，也包括在内吗?
content.en_text: Student: Does that also cover me if I live in university accommodation?

content.cn_text: 售货员:是的。它还包括你在宿舍的任何共享区域，以及你在任何时候留在校园锁储物间的任何东西。
content.en_text: Salesman: Yes, it does. It also covers any shared areas in your accommodation and anything you leave in locked storage on campus at any time.

content.cn_text: 这种性质的索赔有限制吗?
content.en_text: Student: Is there a limit on claims of this nature?

content.cn_text: 售货员:有的。个人物品每次索赔限额为2000英镑，以下物品每组每次索赔限额为5000英镑:贵重物品、乐器和除电脑以外的任何数据存储设备，如cd。dvd，磁带和电脑游戏。衣服的重量限制在250磅以内。但是，超过这些金额的项目需要额外的保险费。
content.en_text: Salesman: Yes, there is. Individual items are limited to two thousand pounds per claim and the following items are limited to  600 pounds per group per claim: valuables,musical instruments and any data storage devices apart from computers, such as CDs.DVDs, cassettes and computer games. Clothes are limited to a maximum of  two hundred and fifty pounds . However, cover for items above these amounts is available for an additional premium .

content.cn_text: 学生:我明白了。那意外伤害呢?
content.en_text: Student: I see. And how about accidental damage?

content.cn_text: 售货员:我们为物品在您房间内发生的意外损坏提供保险，如果您丢失了钥匙，我们还为更换钥匙和锁提供最高150英镑的赔偿。
content.en_text: Salesman: We cover contents against accidental damage occurring while they are in your rooms and we cover replacement keys and locks, up to £150, if you lose your keys.

content.cn_text: 学生:这包括我假期留在宿舍的物品吗?
content.en_text: Student: Does this cover items that I leave in my accommodation during holidays?

content.cn_text: 售货员:是的，但限额较低——总共不超过3000磅——而且只能保35天。前提是房间连续35天无人居住。
content.en_text: Salesman: Yes, it does, but the limit is lower-up to three thousand pounds in total-and there is only cover for up to 35 days. That is if the rooms are unoccupied continuously for 35 days.

content.cn_text: 学生:我明白。我在旅行时是否也有防盗保险?
content.en_text: Student: I understand. Am I also covered against theft whilst travelling?

content.cn_text: 售货员:是的。我还应该指出，你的手机是全保的，保险包括任何通话时间被小偷滥用，最高可达150英镑。
content.en_text: Salesman: Yes, you are. I should also point out that your mobile phone is fully coveredand the insurance covers any airtime abuse by the thief up to 150 pounds .

content.cn_text: 学生:太好了。那法律和健康问题呢?
content.en_text: Student: Great. What about legal and health problems?

content.cn_text: 推销员:你的律师费包括了高达五万英镑，用于对你的索赔，对别人对你造成的损害或伤害的索赔，以及租赁纠纷。最后一个对学生特别有用。如果由于你的疾病、死亡或意外，你不得不提前离开你的课程，或者你所依赖的经济支持的父母生病或被解雇，你在学年中已经支付或有责任支付的课程费用总计高达5000英镑，也可以得到赔偿。
content.en_text: Salesman: Your legal expenses are covered up to fifty thousand pounds for defending claims against you, for claiming against other people for damage or injuiy they cause you,and tenancy disputes . The last one is particularly useful for students. Course fees you have paid or are liable to pay in the academic year up to five thousand pounds in total are also covered, if as a result of your illness , death or accident you have to leave your course early, or if a parent on whom you rely for financial support suffers illness or redundancy .

content.cn_text: 学生:听起来确实很全面。优惠价还适用吗?这里写着有效期到六月底。
content.en_text: Student: That's sounds very comprehensive indeed. Does the special introductory rate still apply? It savs here that it's valid until the end of June.

content.cn_text: 售货员:是的，它仍然有效。要约的条款没有变化。我想说的是，以下额外的保险自动包括在我们所有的保单中——我们的24小时帮助热线，提供关于健康、毒品、债务、住房、法律和福利事务的建议和咨询;为您的个人法律责任提供赔偿，最高可达500英镑，包括贷款给您的财产损失或损坏;对房东财产的损失或损坏，最高可达5000元;信用卡盗窃，最高500英镑;因抢劫或袭击造成的伤害和财产损坏，最高可达5000英镑;父母或监护人意外死亡5000英镑，5000英镑。
content.en_text: Salesman: Yes, it's still valid. There have been no changes in the terms of the offer. Can I just mention that the following extra cover is automatically included free of charge in all our policies -our 24 hour helpline, providing advice and counseling on health, drugs,debt, housing, legal and welfare matters; cover for your personal legal liability of up to a ;loss or damage to property on loan to you, up to 500 ; loss or damage to your landlord's property, up to 5,000 ; credit card theft, up to £500; injury and damage to possessions by mugging or assault, up to £5000; and accidental death of a parent or guardian 5,000 pounds , £5000.

content.cn_text: 学生:这正是我想要的——一个全面的方案。今天下午我会去你的办公室。我应该亲自来见你，还是…?
content.en_text: Student: That's exactly what I'm looking for-a fully comprehensive package . I'll come to your office this afternoon. Should I come to see you personally, or…?

content.cn_text: 售货员:你可以代我问。我叫斯蒂芬斯。
content.en_text: Salesman: You can ask for me. My name is stephens .

content.cn_text: 学生:对。我叫西普顿，安妮·西普顿。
content.en_text: Student: Right. My name is Shipton, Annie Shipton.

content.cn_text: 售货员:好的，今天下午见。我们通常5点下班，但今天我要在这里工作到6点。
content.en_text: Salesman: OK I'll see you this afternoon. We normally close the office at 5 but I'll be here until 6 today.

content.cn_text: 学生:谢谢。我应该在那之前赶到。再见。
content.en_text: Student: Thank you. I should make it before then. Goodbye.

content.cn_text: 售货员:再见。
content.en_text: Salesman: Goodbye.

groups.desc:
Questions 1-2
Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.

items.title: Thieves often target students' homes because students

options.title: C
options.content: are wealthier than other young people.

items.analysis: 文中明确指出学生宿舍是小偷的特殊目标，原因是学生住宿通常包含多个高度便携和有价值的物品，如笔记本电脑。这直接对应了选项B的描述，即学生经常拥有高价值、便携的物品。因此，B选项是正确答案。

items.title: If personal items are lost, destroyed or damaged, the insurance company will usually

options.title: A
options.content: allow the student to buy a similar replacement item at the current cost

options.title: B
options.content: give the student the sum of money the item originally cost.

options.title: C
options.content: give the student a fixed amount.

options.title: D
options.content: get the money from the thief.

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A，因为原文中明确提到保险公司提供"new for old"的赔偿方式。这种方式意味着保险公司会按照当前市场价格赔偿一个新的同类物品，而不考虑旧物品的折旧。这正好符合选项A的描述："allow the student to buy a similar replacement item at the current cost"（允许学生以当前成本购买类似的替换物品）。"new for old"是保险业常用术语，表示保险公司会按照当前市场价格赔偿一个新的同类物品，而不是简单地赔偿原始购买价格。

groups.desc:
Questions 3-6
Decide whether the following are insured for up to.
Note: You can use any letter more than once.

items.title: a computer
items.analysis: 根据原文，单个物品（Individual items）的理赔限额为每次2000英镑。电脑（computer）属于单个物品的类别，而不是特别列出的600英镑限额类别。文中特别强调"apart from computers"（除了电脑），表明电脑不在600英镑的限额内。因此，电脑的理赔限额是2000英镑。

items.title: two musical instruments
items.analysis: 文中明确指出乐器属于每组每次索赔限额为600英镑的物品类别。题目询问两件乐器的保险限额，而乐器作为一个组别被限定在600英镑以内，因此正确答案是C选项。这体现了保险政策对不同类别物品采用不同的赔偿限额，乐器属于特定组别，其赔偿限额与个别物品的限额不同。

items.title: ten computer games
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，数据存储设备（包括电脑游戏）的理赔限额为每组每次600英镑。题目中提到的"ten computer games"属于数据存储设备的范畴，因此其理赔限额也是600英镑。这与选项C相符，所以C是正确答案。

items.title: three suits
items.analysis: 题目中的"suits"（西装）属于衣物类别，原文中使用了更广泛的词"Clothes"来涵盖所有衣物。文中明确指出衣物的理赔上限为250英镑，这正好对应选项B。因此，三套西装的理赔上限也是250英镑。

groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
Complete the following sentences using NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS
AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect:
Academic $15256$ are insured up to £5000.
The $15257$ is valid until the end of June.
The insurance company has a $15258$
The insurance company's office is usually open until $15259$

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是"(course) fees"。在听力原文中，我们可以听到"Course fees you have paid or are liable to pay in the academic year up to five thousand pounds in total are also covered"。这里有几个关键点需要注意：首先，"Academic"在原文中对应的是"Course"，这是一个同义替换；其次，"£5000"在原文中表述为"five thousand pounds"。这个句子明确指出了保险覆盖的是"course fees"，即学费，而且金额正好是题目中提到的5000英镑。因此，"(course) fees"是最符合题目要求的答案。记住，在雅思听力中，我们常常需要进行同义词替换和数字信息的准确识别。这道题就是一个很好的例子，展示了如何将题目中的关键信息与听力原文中的具体表述相匹配。

这道题的关键在于准确捕捉短语"special introductory rate"。题干中的定位词"valid until the end of June"直接对应原文中的"It's valid until the end of June"，而这句话是在询问特别介绍价格是否仍然适用的上下文中出现的。"still apply"是一个重要的信号词，表明接下来会讨论这个优惠价格的有效期。要正确回答这个问题，你需要理解"valid until"和"apply"之间的联系，它们在这个上下文中都指的是优惠价格的适用性。此外，注意不要遗漏"special"这个词，因为完整的短语是"special introductory rate"而不仅仅是"introductory rate"。即使你没有听懂所有内容，只要能够抓住关键词"special"、"rate"和"June"，也有可能答对这道题。这个题目考察了你对特定商业术语的理解，以及对复杂句子结构的把握能力。

这道题的正确答案是"24-hour helpline"，因为文中明确提到这是保险公司自动免费包含在所有保单中的额外服务。题干中的"insurance company has a"暗示我们要找一个保险公司特有的服务。"24 hour helpline"正是这样一个服务，它是全天候提供的，涵盖了多个方面的咨询。这个答案直接对应了题目要求的"保险公司拥有的"某项服务。另外，注意听力中提到这是"automatically included free of charge"，这进一步强调了这个服务的重要性和普遍性。其他提到的服务，如法律费用保障或学费保障，虽然也是保险公司提供的，但并不是公司特有的、随时可用的服务，因此不是这个问题的正确答案。

这道题的关键在于理解"normally"（通常）这个词。虽然说话人提到他今天会待到6点，但题目询问的是保险公司办公室通常的关闭时间。文中明确说明"We normally close the office at 5"，这就是我们需要的答案。记住，在听力考试中，我们常常需要区分常规情况和特殊情况。这里，5点是常规关闭时间，而6点只是今天的特殊安排。因此，正确答案是5（o'clock）。做这类题目时，要特别注意表示常规或通常的词语，如"normally"、"usually"等，这些词往往指示着我们需要的信息。
